title: Debraj Paul Portfolio — Frontend Implementation Plan

requirements.summary: Implement dark blue (#0A1628/#0D2149) and white color scheme with modern typography and fully responsive layout
acceptanceCriteria: Primary background is dark blue, text is white or light gray, accent colors complement the dark blue palette.
Layout is fully responsive and looks polished on mobile, tablet, and desktop.
All sections are accessible via smooth scroll navigation.
Fonts are modern, readable, and consistent across all sections.

file_operations.description: Add custom color palette with dark blue primary (#0A1628 and #0D2149), white, and light gray variants. Configure modern font family stack.
Apply dark blue background colors globally, set white/light gray text colors, configure smooth scroll behavior, and ensure modern typography rendering.

requirements.summary: Create sticky navigation bar with logo/name and anchor links to all sections, with hamburger menu on mobile
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation stays fixed at the top on scroll.
Links smoothly scroll to Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Why Choose Me, and Contact sections.
Hamburger menu works correctly on mobile viewports.

file_operations.description: Create sticky navigation bar with Debraj Paul branding on the left and anchor links (Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Why Choose Me, Contact) on the right. Implement hamburger menu toggle for mobile viewports with smooth scroll behavior.
Import and render Navigation component at the top of the application layout.

requirements.summary: Build Hero section with headline, subheadline, two CTAs, and urgency badge
acceptanceCriteria: Headline is large and prominent.
'Chat on WhatsApp' button opens WhatsApp link in a new tab.
'Get Free Demo' button scrolls to the Contact section.
Urgency line is visually distinct (e.g., badge, pill, or highlighted text).
Hero section has a visually engaging background (gradient, pattern, or hero image).

file_operations.description: Create Hero section with headline 'Professional Business Websites in 48 Hours', subheadline 'I help local businesses get more clients with modern, mobile-optimized websites.', two CTA buttons ('Get Free Demo' scrolling to Contact, 'Chat on WhatsApp' opening https://wa.me/918730818101 in new tab), and urgency badge 'Limited Projects Taken Each Month'. Apply engaging gradient background.
Import and render HeroSection component with id='hero' for anchor navigation.

requirements.summary: Create About Me section with bio, profile photo placeholder, and Request Free Demo CTA
acceptanceCriteria: Bio text is displayed clearly alongside a profile photo or avatar placeholder.
'Request Free Demo' button scrolls to the Contact section.
Section layout is clean with ample whitespace.

file_operations.description: Create About Me section displaying the bio: 'I'm Debraj Paul, a student web developer based in Assam. I help lawyers, gyms, coaching centers and small businesses build affordable, professional websites that generate real client inquiries.' Include the generated profile image from frontend/public/assets/generated/avatar-debraj.dim_400x400.png and a 'Request Free Demo' button that scrolls to the Contact section.
Import and render AboutSection component with id='about' for anchor navigation.

requirements.summary: Display Services section with 5 icon cards showing service offerings
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 service cards are displayed in a responsive grid.
Each card has an icon (SVG or icon font), title, and brief description.
Cards have a hover effect for interactivity.

file_operations.description: Create Services section with 5 service cards in a responsive grid: 'Business Website Design', 'Landing Pages', 'Website Redesign', 'WhatsApp & Call Integration', and 'Basic SEO Setup'. Each card includes an icon, title, and one-line description with hover effects.
Import and render ServicesSection component with id='services' for anchor navigation.

requirements.summary: Build Portfolio section with 3 sample project cards and demo availability note
acceptanceCriteria: 3 portfolio cards are displayed in a responsive grid.
Each card has a thumbnail, title, and short description.
The note 'Demo designs available on request.' is displayed below the cards.
Cards have a hover/overlay effect.

file_operations.description: Create Portfolio section with 3 project cards: 'Sample Gym Website', 'Sample Lawyer Website', and 'Sample Coaching Website'. Use generated thumbnails from frontend/public/assets/generated/portfolio-gym.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/portfolio-lawyer.dim_600x400.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/portfolio-coaching.dim_600x400.png. Include project title, short description, and hover overlay effects. Display note 'Demo designs available on request.' below the cards.
Import and render PortfolioSection component with id='portfolio' for anchor navigation.

requirements.summary: Create Pricing section with 3 tiers (Basic ₹2,500, Standard ₹3,500 Most Popular, Premium ₹5,000)
acceptanceCriteria: Three pricing cards are displayed side by side (stacked on mobile).
Standard card is visually distinct with a 'Most Popular' badge.
Prices are shown in INR with ₹ symbol.
Each card lists features and has a CTA button.
CTA buttons open the WhatsApp link or scroll to Contact.

file_operations.description: Create Pricing section with 3 tiers: Basic (₹2,500), Standard (₹3,500 with 'Most Popular' badge and visual highlight), and Premium (₹5,000). Each card lists tier-appropriate features and includes a CTA button linking to https://wa.me/918730818101 or scrolling to Contact section. Display in responsive grid (side-by-side on desktop, stacked on mobile).
Import and render PricingSection component with id='pricing' for anchor navigation.

requirements.summary: Display Why Choose Me section with 5 benefit points and icons
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 benefit points are displayed with icons or checkmark indicators.
Layout is clean and scannable (grid or list).
Section has a visually distinct background to break up page flow.

file_operations.description: Create Why Choose Me section displaying 5 benefit points with icons or checkmarks: '48 Hour Delivery', 'Affordable Student Pricing', 'Modern Clean Design', 'Direct WhatsApp Support', and 'No Hidden Charges'. Use a distinct background color or pattern to visually separate from other sections. Layout should be scannable (grid or list).
Import and render WhyChooseMeSection component with id='why-choose-me' for anchor navigation.

requirements.summary: Build Contact section with inquiry form and contact details
acceptanceCriteria: Form has Name, Phone, Business Type (text or dropdown), and Message fields with basic validation.
Form submission stores the inquiry in the backend canister.
Success message is shown after successful submission.
Contact details (phone, WhatsApp, email, location) are displayed below the form.
WhatsApp contact detail links to https://wa.me/918730818101.
Phone number is a clickable tel: link.

file_operations.description: Create Contact section with form containing Name, Phone, Business Type, and Message fields with validation. On submit, call backend submitInquiry() method from backend.d.ts and display success message. Below form, display contact details: Call: +918730818101 (tel: link), WhatsApp: +918730818101 (linking to https://wa.me/918730818101), Email: belipaul4567@gmail.com, Location: Assam, India.
Import and render ContactSection component with id='contact' for anchor navigation.

requirements.summary: Add sticky floating WhatsApp button fixed to bottom-right corner
acceptanceCriteria: Button is fixed at the bottom-right corner and always visible while scrolling.
Clicking opens https://wa.me/918730818101 in a new tab.
Button uses WhatsApp green (#25D366) and a recognizable WhatsApp icon.
Button has a tooltip or label 'Chat with me'.

file_operations.description: Create sticky floating WhatsApp button fixed to bottom-right corner using WhatsApp green (#25D366) and WhatsApp icon. Clicking opens https://wa.me/918730818101 in new tab. Include tooltip or label 'Chat with me' and subtle pulse animation.
Import and render WhatsAppButton component to appear globally on all sections.

requirements.summary: Add footer with copyright text and quick links to all sections
acceptanceCriteria: Footer is displayed at the bottom of the page.
Copyright text is present.
Quick-links allow smooth scroll navigation to all sections.

file_operations.description: Create footer with copyright text '© 2024 Debraj Paul. All rights reserved.' and quick links to all sections (Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Why Choose Me, Contact) with smooth scroll behavior.
Import and render Footer component at the bottom of the application layout.

requirements.summary: Wire generated portfolio thumbnails and profile photo into Portfolio and About sections
acceptanceCriteria: Three portfolio thumbnail images are displayed in the Portfolio section cards.
Profile photo placeholder is displayed in the About section.
Images are served from frontend/public/assets/generated.
Images are appropriately sized and do not degrade page load performance.

file_operations.description: Ensure portfolio cards reference the exact generated image filenames: frontend/public/assets/generated/portfolio-gym.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/portfolio-lawyer.dim_600x400.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/portfolio-coaching.dim_600x400.png.
Ensure the profile photo references the exact generated image filename: frontend/public/assets/generated/avatar-debraj.dim_400x400.png with appropriate sizing and optimization.
